description_long: This house features a grand, symmetrical facade with a central turret and steeply pitched, dark slate roofs, reminiscent of Victorian architecture. The exterior walls are painted a muted blue-gray, and the structure is adorned with large, multi-pane windows arranged in neat rows, providing ample natural light. The front of the house is complemented by a formal garden with a circular paved area, surrounded by a variety of trees and flowering shrubs, creating an elegant approach. The side views reveal additional architectural details, including bay windows and a complex roofline with multiple gables and dormers. The landscaping is meticulously organized, with paved walkways leading to and around the house, and a mix of palm trees, deciduous trees, and ornamental plants. The overall impression is of a stately, historic residence set within a manicured urban garden.
description: A stately Victorian-style house with a central turret, steep slate roofs, and symmetrical multi-pane windows, surrounded by formal gardens and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central turret, symmetrical windows, and landscaped garden with a circular paved area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bay windows, complex roofline, and a variety of trees and shrubs in the garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full extent of the garden, circular paved area, and symmetrical arrangement of trees and walkways.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring additional gables, dormers, and a continuation of the landscaped garden and paved paths.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, decorative overhang, and symmetrical landscaping
